untranslatable_reason: Flag pattern detection requires visual/structural pattern recognition (consolidation zone, breakout confirmation) which cannot be expressed with the allowed indicators and operators. The signal requires identifying flag formations (rectangular consolidation with prior trend) and measuring breakout direction relative to the flag, which needs candlestick pattern analysis or price structure logic not available in the allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation using trend direction (ADX) and price action (close vs SMA) as a proxy for trend-following entries, but this does NOT capture the actual flag pattern logic. A proper implementation would require: (1) detection of flag consolidation phase, (2) identification of prior trend pole, (3) breakout confirmation beyond consolidation bounds, and (4) direction matching (up breakout in uptrend, down breakout in downtrend). The regime-based entry conditions reflect the core rule (trade with trend) but lack pattern specificity.
